title: Orban’s Defeat Punctures Europe’s Far Right, but Also Offers It a Road Map
summary_full: Corruption and economic mismanagement brought down Hungary’s authoritarian leader. Will his political disciples avoid those pitfalls?
summary_public: Corruption and economic mismanagement brought down Hungary’s authoritarian leader. Will his political disciples avoid those pitfalls?

HU.label: negative
